Package pjv.view

Class ServerWindow

java.lang.Object
javafx.application.Application
pjv.view.ServerWindow
public class ServerWindow
extends javafx.application.Application
This is the main class for this application. It starts running the application.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Michal Pechník and Oľga Ostashchuk

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class javafx.application.Application

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    void clearVariables()
    This method clears values of variables which temporarily store data.
    void createChatRoom​(javafx.event.ActionEvent event)
    This method creates new chatRoom.
    javafx.scene.Scene createScene()
    This method creates a new scene for the primary stage of this application.
    void deleteChatRoom​(javafx.event.ActionEvent event)
    This method deletes chatRoom selected in chatRoom list.
    void deleteClient​(javafx.event.ActionEvent event)
    This method deletes client selected in client list.
    static void main​(java.lang.String[] args)
    This method starts running this application.
    void onMouseClickedChatRoomList​(javafx.scene.input.MouseEvent event)
    This method saves String of value of clicked item on chatRoom list.
    void onMouseClickedClientList​(javafx.scene.input.MouseEvent event)
    This method saves String of value of clicked item on client list.
    static void refreshLists()
    This method refreshes list of chatroom and list of clients.
    void showAllClients​(javafx.event.ActionEvent event)
    This method shows all clients.
    void showClientsOfChatRoom​(javafx.event.ActionEvent event)
    This method shows clients of selected chatRoom.
    void start​(javafx.stage.Stage primaryStage)
    This method sets snd shows scene of the primary stage.

  • Method Details

    • start

      public void start​(javafx.stage.Stage primaryStage) throws java.lang.Exception
      This method sets snd shows scene of the primary stage.
      Specified by:
      start in class javafx.application.Application
      Parameters:
      primaryStage - Stage the primary stage, onto which the application scene can be set.
      Throws:
      java.lang.Exception - when a Thread abruptly terminates due to an uncaught exception.

    • createScene

      public javafx.scene.Scene createScene()
      This method creates a new scene for the primary stage of this application.
      Returns:
      Scene instance

    • refreshLists

      public static void refreshLists()
      This method refreshes list of chatroom and list of clients.

    • createChatRoom

      public void createChatRoom​(javafx.event.ActionEvent event)
      This method creates new chatRoom.
      Parameters:
      event - ActionEvent on clicking on the Create new chatRoom button.

    • onMouseClickedChatRoomList

      public void onMouseClickedChatRoomList​(javafx.scene.input.MouseEvent event)
      This method saves String of value of clicked item on chatRoom list.
      Parameters:
      event - MouseEvent on clicking on the item of chatRoom list.

    • onMouseClickedClientList

      public void onMouseClickedClientList​(javafx.scene.input.MouseEvent event)
      This method saves String of value of clicked item on client list.
      Parameters:
      event - MouseEvent on clicking on the item of client list.

    • showClientsOfChatRoom

      public void showClientsOfChatRoom​(javafx.event.ActionEvent event)
      This method shows clients of selected chatRoom.
      Parameters:
      event - ActionEvent on clicking on the Show clients button.

    • showAllClients

      public void showAllClients​(javafx.event.ActionEvent event)
      This method shows all clients.
      Parameters:
      event - ActionEvent on clicking on the Show all clients button.

    • deleteClient

      public void deleteClient​(javafx.event.ActionEvent event)
      This method deletes client selected in client list.
      Parameters:
      event - ActionEvent on clicking on the Delete client button.

    • deleteChatRoom

      public void deleteChatRoom​(javafx.event.ActionEvent event)
      This method deletes chatRoom selected in chatRoom list.
      Parameters:
      event - ActionEvent on clicking on the Delete chatRoom button.

    • clearVariables

      public void clearVariables()
      This method clears values of variables which temporarily store data.

    • main

      public static void main​(java.lang.String[] args)
      This method starts running this application.
